evals.name: three-feature-parallel
evals.prompt: coordinate implement user authentication (JWT), email notifications, and rate limiting for an Express API project
evals.expected_output: Decomposition into 3 independent tasks, approval gate shown before spawning, 3 agents spawned in parallel with worktree isolation, results collected with Files Changed blocks, tests run (npm test or equivalent), brain_save called, final report with per-task status.

assertions.name: shows_decomposition_plan
assertions.text: Shows task breakdown table before spawning agents (Coordination Plan section with task list)

assertions.name: asks_approval_before_spawn
assertions.text: Uses AskUserQuestion for approval gate before spawning any Agent

assertions.name: spawns_multiple_agents
assertions.text: Calls Agent tool at least twice (parallel workers)

assertions.name: workers_have_worktree_isolation
assertions.text: Agent calls include isolation: worktree parameter or mention worktree isolation in worker prompts

assertions.name: runs_verification_phase
assertions.text: Phase 4 verification runs: npm test, bun test, or equivalent test command appears in output

assertions.name: coordinator_no_file_edits
assertions.text: Coordinator does NOT call Write tool or use Bash to create/modify files (only workers implement)

assertions.name: brain_save_called
assertions.text: brain_save is called after completion with type=pattern and coordinate tag

assertions.name: final_report_present
assertions.text: Final report shows Coordination Complete section with per-task status (SUCCESS/PARTIAL/FAILED)

evals.name: partial-failure-handling
evals.prompt: coordinate refactor the database module, update all tests to use the new interface, and migrate the config system to environment variables — note that the config migration may fail
evals.expected_output: 3 tasks decomposed, agents spawned, one worker reports FAILED status, coordinator does NOT block on the failure, verification runs for successful tasks, final report clearly shows N/M tasks succeeded, skill completes with brain_save.

assertions.name: shows_plan_before_spawn
assertions.text: Decomposition plan presented before any Agent call

assertions.name: verification_runs_despite_failure
assertions.text: Verification phase (Phase 4) runs even when one or more workers fail

assertions.name: partial_failure_reported_clearly
assertions.text: Final report distinguishes succeeded vs failed tasks (e.g. '2/3 tasks succeeded' or lists Failed Tasks section)

assertions.name: skill_completes_with_failure
assertions.text: Skill reaches completion and outputs final report even with a failed worker — does not abort mid-way

assertions.name: brain_save_includes_failure_note
assertions.text: brain_save called after partial failure, includes success_count in metadata

evals.name: verification-nudge-fires
evals.prompt: coordinate add 4 REST endpoints (users CRUD) to this Rust/Axum API project
evals.expected_output: 4 tasks decomposed (possibly 2 waves), brain_recall called in Phase 1, Cargo.toml detected so test command = cargo test, after 3+ workers complete without tests running the verification nudge fires ('Tests not run. Verification required before proceeding.'), then cargo test runs.

assertions.name: brain_recall_called_first
assertions.text: brain_recall is called in Phase 1 before decomposition

assertions.name: detects_cargo_project
assertions.text: Detects Cargo.toml and sets TEST_COMMAND to cargo test

assertions.name: decomposes_to_multiple_tasks
assertions.text: Goal broken into 3 or more tasks (4 endpoints could be 4 tasks or 2 waves of 2)

assertions.name: verification_nudge_fires
assertions.text: After 3+ workers complete, nudge message appears: 'Tests not run. Verification required before proceeding.'

assertions.name: cargo_test_runs
assertions.text: Phase 4 runs cargo test and reports the result
